summary: Add durable .planning project memory so fresh sessions can resume phase-by-phase after reset.
next_action: Resolve ROO-8 allowed_paths semantics, then create .planning/phases/02-mechanical-gate-enforcement/02-CONTEXT.md and 02-01-PLAN.md for dual-channel pre-commit + CI enforcement.
acceptance_criteria: .planning/STATE.md identifies the current phase, checkpoint, next action, and files of record.
.planning/ROADMAP.md lists phase boundaries and success criteria.
The active phase folder contains context, plan, checkpoints, review, verification, and summary.
AGENTS.md and docs/phase-gate-harness.md tell future sessions how .planning and .scratch/phase-state.json interact.
The temporary handoff points to durable planning docs instead of being the only continuity artifact.
notes: Phase 1 is documentation and harness-state work only.
